creator: brett@peloton.physics.montana.edu
text:
This is a new port of asmail - another "biff" type program
	that has been designed to integrate well w/ AfterStep and
	can be docked, and animated.

How-To-Repeat: 
	The port has been uploaded into incoming:
 	ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/asmail-0.50.tar.gz
